title: livistona rigida
intro: Livistona rigida, also known as the fan palm, is a species of palm tree native to Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various ailments such as wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of Livistona rigida include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's sap or leaves are typically used to create topical creams, ointments, or infusions that can be applied directly to the affected area.
